name: local-knowledge-chatbot
description: Offline scraper-data knowledge engine chatbot with local search, cleaning, analysis, CLI, and UI.

scripts.start:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run legacy:test && npm run build --prefix frontend
